content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1466: Are You Still Sleepy?

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Deep under the sea, so many stars were moving and illuminating the seabed.

Shi Yan stood between the stars and starlight twirled around him like a waterfall. The stars gathered and created a massive silver bear, which then spurted a stream of cold energy.

Emperor Sea Shark was hit and he sank deeper. When he could steady his body, he looked mindful of the situation.

“What’s that?”

Mei Ji was surprised and she observed the big bear made of dozens of crystals, her beautiful eyes frightened. She could feel an aura of something from the isolated Absolute Beginning Era. That aura was special and cold.

That massive bear was the essence of the stars. It looked so real and it glowed in a silver halo. The bear created by dozens of stars almost shaded the sky in the Sea of Annihilation’s seabed.

It’s the Little Bear! Constellation power!

At Second Sky of Immortal Realm, Shi Yan’s Star power Upanishad was greatly advanced. He had gathered the broken stars and stashed them in his Incipient Extent. Afterward, he figured out that they were actually a constellation above the Sea of Annihilation.

The constellation consisted of many bright stars and they were related to each other. The stars with the spirit can connect to each other after staying together for billions of years. The spirit or the soul of those stars can blend with each other magically to create the mysterious power of the entire constellation.

The Little Bear constellation was created by the souls of dozens of stars. It was the combination of the stars’ souls. A surging beam of starlight from it had awakened Emperor Sea Shark.

Emperor Sea Shark started smiling. He lifted his head and looked at Shi Yan. He snarled, “Why did you return?”

Shi Yan frowned and didn’t look at him. The black hole emerged from behind his head. The demon’s mouth opened and sucked.

Instantly, so many souls shrieked and screeched. The warriors who had only soul altars left after Emperor Sea Shark’s attack were so frightened.

The water pressure that had increased dozens of times burst and their soul altars were left floating in the deep sea. They were observing a battle to gain something.

However, as soon as a black hole emerged, they completely collapsed. They screeched and tried to run away.

Unfortunately, it was too late.

No matter how hard they struggled, their soul altars couldn’t get rid of the black hole’s suction force. They revolved and were dragged into Shi Yan’s black hole.

The sinister black hole stirred and swallowed soul altars while releasing a fierce soul energy fluctuation! Many people in this area were shaking in fear!

Including Neptune’s brutal souls!

Devouring power Upanishad was the nemesis of the ghosts or things in soul form. After the black hole emerged, the three brutal souls that were like imposing mountains were now shivering like kittens by Neptune.

The two brutal souls fighting with Ming Hao were feeble as if they were the willow catkins that were about to vanish.

Shi Yan observed Neptune’s brutal souls. He understood it immediately: If his Devouring power Upanishad reached a certain level, he could subdue the brutal souls of the Soul Clan. He could even swallow those brutal souls as he swallowed the soul altars.

As Ming Hao was also a soul form, he didn’t feel well when a black hole appeared. But with his Soul Control power Upanishad and Space power Upanishad, he could adjust his condition shortly after. He sealed himself in a small, private space to avoid the Devouring power Upanishad.

“Devouring power Upanishad!”

“It’s the exclusive secret of the Devouring Clan! Devouring power Upanishad!”

“But they said that the Devouring Clan didn’t have any warrior cultivating Devouring power Upanishad? How could he know that?”

“Gosh, the Devouring power Upanishad comes back!”

“. . .”

The warriors of the Sea of Annihilation were panic-stricken. They screamed and their faces were ugly.

Qi Mo and the Devouring Clan warriors had the worst grimace. Looking at Shi Yan use the Devouring power Upanishad of their clan to swallow so many soul altars, they felt their hearts bleed. Their eyes flared with the flame of anger. This Devouring power Upanishad belonged to their ancestor but now, even the direct descendants couldn’t even use it. This damn kid was using it to slaughter them now!

“It’s our Devouring Clan’s exclusive power Upanishad!” Qi Mo screamed indignantly like an enraged beast. The twisted, chaotic magnetic field emitted from him and attacked Shi Yan furiously.

“Pathetic,” Mei Ji smiled like hundreds of flowers blooming. Her graceful body danced and so many icicles shot from the sky that hit Qi Mo.

Qi Mo’s body became a mess of blood and flesh.

“Why did Mei Ji become so fierce? They said that she’s hurt severely, didn’t they?”

The warriors from the Devouring Clan under Qi Mo’s command screamed. They couldn’t believe it, either. Just like Qi Mo, they stormed and advanced toward Mei Ji and Shi Yan.

“Constellation power!”

Shi Yan smiled and stooped his body. The big silver bear acted exactly like him. It stooped and pounded its furry fist on the prey underneath.

The big furry fist brought starlight bands in the sky and fell on Qi Mo and the warriors of the Devouring Clan.

Boop! Boop! Boop!

Except for Qi Mo, the Devouring Clan warriors were smashed like watermelons; their bones became bone dust. Qi Mo’s body was crushed. In his last moment, he used the chaotic energy to stir his soul altar and attacked Shi Yan once more time.

Tu Shi Qi, Ya Yun, and Forefather Dragon Lizard were watching the battle. They gawked and even the God Lord and Ming Hao had to smack their tongue. They screamed and appraised the abnormal kid.

Some warriors in Qi Mo’s crew had even reached Second Sky of Immortal Realm, but they couldn’t resist the Bear’s big fists.

At the Peak of Immortal Realm, Qi Mo’s body had been blasted off under the Bear’s fists. They were very strong!

They didn’t know that Shi Yan’s body, power, realm, and power Upanishads had leaped up after he had parted from them. While killing around the Sea of Annihilation’s seabed, Shi Yan had gained benefits beyond their understanding. His body and power had strengthened greatly. He entered Second Sky of Immortal Realm with a new understanding of Star power Upanishad in addition to the Little Bear Constellation.

At this moment, Shi Yan was at the peak of his life. He was a true God of Slaughter that descended to this world.

“Using Chaos power Upanishad to deal with me?” Shi Yan grinned when he saw Qi Mo storming toward him. “Are you still sleepy?”

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

The black hole above Shi Yan’s head looked like a terrifying whirlpool with a powerful suction force that was increasing as if it could suck all things in this world!

The big silver bear by Shi Yan also felt the danger. It instinctively ducked...

Billions of years ago, the Absolute Beginning creature Devour had used this power Upanishad to swallow so many stars and refine star energy, making it a part of his own energy to transform.

The stars could feel the evil features of the Devouring power Upanishad and they knew that it could dissolve them.

The Chaos power Upanishad was one of the eight great, evil power Upanishad from Devour. They were naturally bound to Devouring power Upanishad. Qi Mo had used the power of his blood and flesh to urge the soul altar. Shi Yan was correct: He was still sleepy!

“Not good! Qi Mo doesn’t know the danger! The Devouring Clan has lost the power Upanishad for a long time they forgot the bond between the Devouring power Upanishad and the eight evil powers. This man courts death!” Many onlookers were screaming.

Qi Mo suddenly screamed desperately. The black hole arose and his Chaos power Upanishad stopped listening to him. The suction force had pulled him into the black whirlpool.

As Qi Mo saw the fatal situation, he made up his mind. While screaming crazily, his body exploded and he became a flesh bomb that attacked the other.

His soul altar tried to run away when his body exploded. He had attempted to get rid of the Devouring power Upanishad.

In that moment, he finally believed in his precursors that the Devouring power Upanishad could subdue the eight evil powers!

He was totally convinced!

However, it was too late!

“Do you know how Gan Fu died?” Shi Yan faced the sky and smiled crazily, his laughter reverberating in the entire Sea of Annihilation. “She died foolishly like you. She wanted to use the Corrosion power Upanishad to kill me, an expert with Devouring power Upanishad. She died because of that. Well, just like her, you will never escape!”

Boom!

Qi Mo was shaken. As he was about to run away, Shi Yan’s words had struck him. Finally, he had lost his mind completely. He howled like a beast and his soul altar burned.

All the warriors in this area saw the burning soul altar storm toward Shi Yan and attempt to drag him into hell altogether.

“Shi Yan! Watch out!” Mei Ji screamed.

“Don’t swallow the soul altar that is burning vitality. It’ll create trouble!” Ming Hao also reminded.

“Er?” Shi Yan was surprised. Then, he sneered, “You can’t do anything!”

A Fantasy Boundary Stone arose in front of his chest and created a misty world. Qi Mo’s burning soul altar flew into the world created by the Fantasy Boundary Stone.

Boom!

Qi Mo’s soul altar exploded. The world inside the Fantasy Boundary Stone exploded into pieces.

When the Fantasy Boundary Stone exploded, Shi Yan’s body had hundreds of cuts on his body, most of them deep to the bone. His face also bore many cuts and was bleeding terribly.

Qi Mo was gone. He had burned his soul altar to kill Shi Yan, but all he could do was to destroy one of Shi Yan’s Fantasy Boundary Stones.

However, the Fantasy Boundary Stone was pumped by Shi Yan’s God power and power Upanishad. When it shattered, it also backfired at Shi Yan and wounded him.

Shi Yan was bleeding. He smacked his tongue as he was a little scared.

At the Third Sky of Immortal Realm, the power when Qi Mo’s soul altar burst off was really terrifying. Shi Yan had reacted timely and released the Fantasy Boundary Stone. Otherwise, Qi Mo’s self-detonation would have made him a puddle of blood.

Qi Mo and his crew from the Devouring Clan were killed tragically. Shi Yan hovered by the big silver bear and looked like he had endured hundreds of gashes.

His face was also gory, which sent shivers down people’s spines.

Shi Yan grinned eccentrically as people were watching him. His laughter made people shiver in fear.
